DISCOVERY 302, DEFENDANT ANTOINE MAGEE'S MOTION TO COMPEL PLAINTIFF'S TESTIMONY AT DEPOSITION AND PLAINTIFF'S RESPONSES TO DEFENDANTS DISCOVERY REQUESTS; REQUEST FOR MONETARY SANCTIONS. NO APPEARANCES. THOSE WHO HAVE NOT MADE AN APPEARANCE ARE DEEMED TO HAVE STIPULATED TO THE MATTER BEING DECIDED BY THE JUDGE PRO TEM. THE COURT ADOPTS ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS: DEFENDANT'S MOTION TO COMPEL PLAINTIFF'S DEPOSITION AND VERIFIED RESPONSES TO DEFENDANT'S DISCOVERY REQUESTS IS GRANTED, NO OPPOSITION FILED. PLAINTIFF IS HEREBY ORDERED TO SUBMIT TO A DEPOSITION WHICH SHALL BE COMPLETED BY JUNE 30, 2017. PLAINTIFF IS FURTHER ORDERED TO WRITTEN, VERIFIED RESPONSES TO FORM INTERROGATORIES SET TWO, REQUEST FOR ADMISSIONS SET ONE, REQUEST FOR SUPPLEMENTAL INTERROGATORY RESPONSES SET ONE AND SUPPLEMENTAL REQUEST FOR PRODUCTION OF DOCUMENTS NOT LATER THAN JUNE 15, 2015. IT IS FURTHER ORDERED THAT DEFENDANT'S REQUEST FOR MONETARY SANCTIONS IN THE AMOUNT OF $710.00 AGAINST PLAINTIFF IS GRANTED. THESE SANCTIONS ARE PAYABLE BY PLAINTIFF'S COUNSEL, PHILIP M. ANDERSEN & ASSOCIATES BY JUNE 30, 2017. PREVAILING PARTY TO SUBMIT A PROPOSED FORM OF ORDER. JUDGE PRO TEM: ANNE HIPSHMAN, CLERK: E. LARNAUTI, NOT REPORTED

Notice Of Motion And Motion For Terminating Sanctions For Failure To Comply With Court Order Compelling Discovery
Off Calendar Aug-14-2017 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
No appearance, The Court adopted it's tentative ruling; DEFENDANT ANTOINE MAGEE'S Motion For Terminating Sanctions For Failure To Comply With Court Order Compelling Discovery IS TAKEN OFF CALENDAR, PER THE REQUEST OF THE MOVING PARTY. Judge: Noah D. Lebowitz; Clerk: Johnny Sengmany; Not Reported. (302/JPT/HK)

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Plaintiffs Testimony At Deposition And Plaintiffs Responses To Defendants Discovery Requests Request For Monetary Sanctions
Off Calendar Jun-01-2017 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: DEFENDANT ANTOINE MAGEE'S MOTION TO COMPEL PLAINTIFF'S TESTIMONY AT DEPOSITION AND PLAINTIFF'S RESPONSES TO DEFENDANTS DISCOVERY REQUESTS; REQUEST FOR MONETARY SANCTIONS.

No Appearances. Those who have not made an appearance are deemed to have stipulated to the matter being decided by the Judge Pro Tem. The Court adopts its tentative ruling as follows: Defendant's Motion to compel Plaintiff's deposition and verified responses to Defendant's discovery requests is GRANTED, no opposition filed. Plaintiff is hereby ORDERED to submit to a deposition which shall be completed by June 30, 2017. Plaintiff is further ORDERED to written, verified responses to Form Interrogatories Set Two, Request for Admissions Set One, Request for Supplemental Interrogatory Responses Set One and Supplemental Request for Production of Documents not later than June 15, 2015. It is further ORDERED that Defendant's request for monetary sanctions in the amount of $710.00 against Plaintiff is GRANTED. These sanctions are payable by Plaintiff's counsel, Philip M. Andersen & Associates by June 30, 2017. Prevailing party to submit a proposed form of order. Judge Pro Tem: Anne Hipshman, Clerk: E. Larnauti, Not Reported
